title: Logical error when reading part with granule smaller than index_granularity
poc:
CREATE TABLE tab
(
    `i` Int64,
    `s` String,
    INDEX by_s s TYPE bloom_filter(0.001) GRANULARITY 1,
)
ENGINE = MergeTree
ORDER BY i
SETTINGS index_granularity = 4,index_granularity_bytes = 0, min_bytes_for_wide_part = 0;
INSERT INTO tab SELECT number, toString(number) FROM numbers(6);
key_bug_features: Reading parts with granule smaller than index_granularity
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id Int32, name String, age UInt8, score Float32, created_at DateTime) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id SETTINGS index_granularity = 2;
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (1, 'Alice', 25, 88.5, now()), (2, 'Bob', 30, 92.0, now());
INSERT INTO test_table SELECT number, toString(number), number % 100, number / 10.0, now() FROM numbers(5);
SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE name = 'Bob' AND age < 30;
